records.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh... ngh...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh... ngh...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh... ngh...

records.m_Talk_ENG: So that fine swagger ends drowned out by a death rattle.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So that fine swagger ends drowned out by a death rattle.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So that fine swagger ends drowned out by a death rattle.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Bow your knees even now, and I shall personally forgive your long insolence.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Bow your knees even now, and I shall personally forgive your long insolence.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Bow your knees even now, and I shall personally forgive your long insolence.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Commander-class unit isn't moving, just slyly stalling with lower C.O.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Commander-class unit isn't moving, just slyly stalling with lower C.O.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Commander-class unit isn't moving, just slyly stalling with lower C.O.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I factor in Garguantia's operating window... dragging this out any longer is dangerous.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I factor in Garguantia's operating window... dragging this out any longer is dangerous.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I factor in Garguantia's operating window... dragging this out any longer is dangerous.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll be frank, Jaina.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll be frank, Jaina.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll be frank, Jaina.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Without power fed from the ship's engine, I can't keep running Garguantia much longer.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Without power fed from the ship's engine, I can't keep running Garguantia much longer.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Without power fed from the ship's engine, I can't keep running Garguantia much longer.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If we're to fell the foe, we stake everything on the next strike.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If we're to fell the foe, we stake everything on the next strike.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If we're to fell the foe, we stake everything on the next strike.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Understood.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Understood.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Understood.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll draw her attention so you can get through, Lieutenant General!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll draw her attention so you can get through, Lieutenant General!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll draw her attention so you can get through, Lieutenant General!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tsk. So you still had some strength left?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tsk. So you still had some strength left?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tsk. So you still had some strength left?

records.m_Talk_ENG: But breaking through my sisters to reach me is impossible.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But breaking through my sisters to reach me is impossible.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But breaking through my sisters to reach me is impossible.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We'll see about that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We'll see about that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We'll see about that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...What?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...What?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...What?

records.m_Talk_ENG: When did you slip behind me...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: When did you slip behind me...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: When did you slip behind me...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff* *Huff...*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff* *Huff...*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff* *Huff...*

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did we do it...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did we do it...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did we do it...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fufu...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fufu...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fufu...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I see. So that is why you never showed Counter abilities until now?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I see. So that is why you never showed Counter abilities until now?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I see. So that is why you never showed Counter abilities until now?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Going for my throat while your life's on the line... not bad at all, darling.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Going for my throat while your life's on the line... not bad at all, darling.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Going for my throat while your life's on the line... not bad at all, darling.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Commander-class units... exist in multiples?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Commander-class units... exist in multiples?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Commander-class units... exist in multiples?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'd prefer you skip the Commander-class label. We are sisters, chosen by the queen.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'd prefer you skip the Commander-class label. We are sisters, chosen by the queen.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'd prefer you skip the Commander-class label. We are sisters, chosen by the queen.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Filling a family's void with more family is hardly a big deal, is it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Filling a family's void with more family is hardly a big deal, is it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Filling a family's void with more family is hardly a big deal, is it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Lieutenant General...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Lieutenant General...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Lieutenant General...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do not fret. You are clever. My other sisters will like you too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do not fret. You are clever. My other sisters will like you too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do not fret. You are clever. My other sisters will like you too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now... close your eyes and savor the comfort.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now... close your eyes and savor the comfort.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now... close your eyes and savor the comfort.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh dear, seems there were more moths that do not value life.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh dear, seems there were more moths that do not value life.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh dear, seems there were more moths that do not value life.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Y-you people are...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Y-you people are...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Y-you people are...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Looks like we're not late after all.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Looks like we're not late after all.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Looks like we're not late after all.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha. A veteran's virtue is never missing the crucial moment.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha. A veteran's virtue is never missing the crucial moment.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha. A veteran's virtue is never missing the crucial moment.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Good thing we splurged on quality CSE hazmat suits off the Dark Network.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Good thing we splurged on quality CSE hazmat suits off the Dark Network.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Good thing we splurged on quality CSE hazmat suits off the Dark Network.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That all? The famous mechanic <color=#ffd34c>Hamswings</color> even modded our weapons.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That all? The famous mechanic <color=#ffd34c>Hamswings</color> even modded our weapons.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That all? The famous mechanic <color=#ffd34c>Hamswings</color> even modded our weapons.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah. Feels like the winds of comeback are starting to blow around us.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah. Feels like the winds of comeback are starting to blow around us.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah. Feels like the winds of comeback are starting to blow around us.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Feast your eyes. This is the secret art of awakened mercs!

records.m_Talk_FRA: Feast your eyes. This is the secret art of awakened mercs!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mickey, did you pull the trigger?

records.m_Talk_FRA: Mickey, did you pull the trigger?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Looking closer... I think a few parts are missing?

records.m_Talk_FRA: Looking closer... I think a few parts are missing?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Gyaaaaaah!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Gyaaaaaah!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Gyaaaaaah!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What the heck?! That Hamswings guy was supposed to be a famous mechanic!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What the heck?! That Hamswings guy was supposed to be a famous mechanic!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What the heck?! That Hamswings guy was supposed to be a famous mechanic!

records.m_Talk_FRA: How should I know?! Who would've thought this would happen after we blew all our Replacer incident payout?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Die, you lowly worms.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Die, you lowly worms.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Die, you lowly worms.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No... It's dangerous!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: No... It's dangerous!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: No... It's dangerous!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: A promise is a promise...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: A promise is a promise...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: A promise is a promise...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just like we said, we dragged her over, miss!!

records.m_Talk_FRA: Just like we said, we dragged her over, miss!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. Thank you for your hard work.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. Thank you for your hard work.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Leave the rest to us.

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-what...?!
